api_name: Bind and crypt a message to an image
semantic_description: message 是接口 Bind and crypt a message to an image（POST:/messinimage/）的输入参数，类型为 STRING，用于表达 message_text；原始说明：Your message to bind to the image! The message size cannot be bigger then the image width*image height *3。

api_name: Bind and crypt a message to an image
semantic_description: messageName 是接口 Bind and crypt a message to an image（POST:/messinimage/）的输入参数，类型为 STRING，用于表达 message_text；原始说明：A name or id for the message! You can use this name or Id for various message so you can classify your messages.。

api_name: Bind and crypt a message to an image
semantic_description: image 是接口 Bind and crypt a message to an image（POST:/messinimage/）的输入参数，类型为 BINARY，用于表达 image_blob；原始说明：The image。

api_name: Bind and crypt a message to an image
semantic_description: authorizedUsers 是接口 Bind and crypt a message to an image（POST:/messinimage/）的输入参数，类型为 STRING，用于表达 authorizedusers；原始说明：You can define any other authorized users to access this message for example: an email, an ID or a name! this value can then be used in the getmess request and will be allowed toget the message! This should be passed as  string with comma separator if more as one user: **user1@gmail.co,user2','user3**。

api_name: Get the message binded to an image
semantic_description: messageName 是接口 Get the message binded to an image（POST:/getmess/）的输入参数，类型为 STRING，用于表达 message_text；原始说明：the username。

api_name: Get the message binded to an image
semantic_description: image 是接口 Get the message binded to an image（POST:/getmess/）的输入参数，类型为 BINARY，用于表达 image_blob；原始说明：The image containing the message。

api_name: Get the message binded to an image
semantic_description: user_ref_img 是接口 Get the message binded to an image（POST:/getmess/）的输入参数，类型为 STRING，用于表达 user_ref_img；原始说明：When creating an crypted message binded toan image you will get a reference ID for the message! This reference is connected to a user ID defined in the body and the image that will be used to generate the message true a specific algorythm!。

api_name: Get the message binded to an image
semantic_description: authorizedUser 是接口 Get the message binded to an image（POST:/getmess/）的输入参数，类型为 STRING，用于表达 authorizeduser；原始说明：The name of an authorized user to get the message, the credentials in the header must be the same base64 as the one created when creating the message。
